character_dossiers.name: Mr. Blandly
character_dossiers.biography: Friend of the squire who came to bid the captain a good voyage.

character_dossiers.name: Long John
character_dossiers.biography: Crew member who leads the chorus of a song about the dead man's chest.

character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: Commands the ship, orders Mr. Arrow below, and declares 'Overboard!'

character_dossiers.name: Mr. Arrow
character_dossiers.biography: Crew member who becomes drunk, is ordered below, and disappears.

character_dossiers.name: Job Anderson
character_dossiers.biography: Boatswain who serves as mate after Mr. Arrow's disappearance.

character_dossiers.name: Mr. Trelawney
character_dossiers.biography: Individual who followed the sea and took a watch in easy weather.

character_dossiers.name: Israel Hands
character_dossiers.biography: Coxswain described as careful, wily, and experienced.

character_dossiers.name: Barbecue
character_dossiers.biography: Cook who uses a crutch and maintains a clean galley with a parrot.

character_dossiers.name: Hawkins
character_dossiers.biography: Individual who interacts with Barbecue and is addressed as 'my son.'
